\section{Professional Summary}
Software Development Engineer with \textbf{3 years} of experience in \textbf{Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC)}, \textbf{SOA}, \textbf{VBCS}, and \textbf{cloud-native} integration development. Proven expertise in designing \textbf{microservices}-oriented, \textbf{event-driven architectures}, scalable \textbf{REST/SOAP API} integrations, and \textbf{CI/CD} automation pipelines, with a strong focus on system reliability, performance optimization, and root cause analysis.
